# Perplexity

> AI Registry entry [AIR-18](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-18/perplexity) — status **Sandbox** as of 2026-04-06. Departments: —.

**Category:** AI Search Engine / Research Assistant
**Cost per User/Month:** Free; $20 Pro; $40 Enterprise Pro
**Departments:** TBD (unassigned)

## Overview

AI-powered search engine combining LLM reasoning with real-time web search to deliver sourced, cited answers. Synthesises information from multiple sources into comprehensive answers with inline citations.

## Capabilities

* AI-powered search with citations
* Pro Search — multi-step research with clarifying questions
* Focus modes (Academic, YouTube, Reddit, Writing, Wolfram Alpha)
* File analysis (PDFs, CSVs, images)
* Collections — organise research by topic
* Pages — publishable research articles
* REST API (Pro/Enterprise)
* Internal knowledge search (Enterprise)

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 Type II (Enterprise)
* SSO/SAML on Enterprise Pro
* No training on queries (Enterprise)
* Free/Pro tier data handling differs

## Considerations

* Overlaps with [[gemini|Gemini]] search grounding and [[claude|Claude]] web research
* Enterprise plan needed for SOC 2 and SSO
* $40/seat adds up quickly for broad deployment
* Evaluate incremental value over existing Gemini + Claude stack

*Currently in Sandbox. Functional tier.*
